name: Bobby Lee
bio: Bobby Lee is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and podcaster, the first Asian American cast member on the sketch series MADtv, where he performed from 2001 to 2009. He is known for an unfiltered, self-deprecating act drawing on his addiction history and his Korean American upbringing. He co-hosts the popular podcast TigerBelly and has appeared in films including Pineapple Express and Harold and Kumar Go to White Castle.

timeline.ev: Joins MADtv as its first Asian American cast member
Appears in the film Pineapple Express
Becomes a series regular on Splitting Up Together
Announces his first stand-up special, set for Hulu

accolades: First Asian American cast member of MADtv
Host of the long-running TigerBelly podcast
Film roles in Pineapple Express and The Dictator

bits.t: Getting Recognized as the Wrong Asian Celebrity
And Then I Shit My Pants
